scripts.package:dir: npm run build && node ../../scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && node ../../scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.yml --mac --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run build && node ../../scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.yml --win --x64 --publish never
